articles.title: ‘Had drinks’: Karnataka tourist ignores warning, swept away while sitting on rocks at Goa beach
articles.summary: A tourist's holiday in Goa turned tragic after he ignored safety warnings and his friend's pleas, losing his life at Baga beach. Ashpaq Masali, 34, reportedly consumed alcohol before attempting a daredevil stunt on slippery rocks, only to be swept away by a powerful wave.

articles.title: Rajasthan RSSB declares VDO final result 2026, merit list published for 850 Gram Vikas Adhikari posts; download PDFs here
articles.summary: Rajasthan RSSB VDO final result 2026: The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB), Jaipur, has declared the final result for the Gram Vikas Adhikari (VDO) recruitment examination conducted for 850 vacancies. The final result was released on June 24, 2026, following the written examination and subsequent selection process.

articles.title: NEST 2026 result announced at nestexam.in; scorecard download link to be activated on June 30
articles.summary: NEST 2026 Result: NISER and UM-DAE CEBS announced the NEST 2026 results on June 24, 2026, while scorecards will be available for download from June 30 at 2 PM through the official website. Candidates can access their results using their application number or user ID and password.

articles.title: RVUNL Recruitment 2026: Short notice for 2,005 JE, JA and Accountant vacancies released; check here
articles.summary: RVUNL Recruitment 2026: Rajasthan Rajya Vidyut Utpadan Nigam Limited (RVUNL) has announced a recruitment drive for 2,005 vacancies across five Rajasthan power companies. The openings include Junior Engineer-I, Junior Accountant and Junior Assistant/Commercial Assistant-II posts.

articles.title: TS SSC Supplementary Result 2026 out today; marks memo available at bse.telangana.gov.in
articles.summary: The Board of Secondary Education, Telangana has declared the TS SSC Supplementary Result 2026 for students who appeared in the Advanced Supplementary Examinations held from June 5 to 12. Candidates can check their results and download updated marks memos using their hall ticket numbers through official portals.
